center.name: 巽他荒原森林
center.summary: 巽他荒原森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括红头林鹧鸪、Bornean black magpie、黑胁啄花鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits primary forest, including dipterocarp, kerangas and peat swamp forest, and is also found in secondary forest, overgrown tree plantations and scrub.{{cite book |title=The Birds of Borneo |author1=Smythies, Bertram E

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in lower montane forest, including kerangas heath forest, alluvial forest, and poor quality forest in sandy soils

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits a range of forest habitats, including primary and secondary montane forest, kerangas forest, and scrub, and is also occasionally found in gardens
